advantages: Central control of severity, destination and format without editing call sites.
Per-module named loggers allow fine-grained filtering.
Levels let the same code be verbose in dev and quiet in prod.
Standard library, integrates with most frameworks and log aggregators.
disadvantages: More setup than print for trivial scripts.
The logger/handler/formatter model has a learning curve.
Easy to accidentally double-log or misconfigure the root logger.
Careless logging can leak secrets or PII into log stores.
